name: Uppy (JavaScript File Uploader)

auth.notes: Transloadit API key for cloud processing; bare uploader needs none

performance.notes: File transfer speed; Uppy overhead is negligible

agent_readiness.notes: Feature-rich file upload widget. Plugins: Dashboard UI (drag-drop, webcam, screen capture), XHR Upload, Tus (resumable), S3 Multipart, Image Cropper, Compressor. Sources: local, Google Drive, Dropbox, Box, Unsplash, Instagram. Framework integrations: React, Vue, Angular, Svelte. uppy.upload() triggers upload. uppy.on('complete', handler). Transloadit for cloud encoding/processing. TUS protocol for resumable uploads to any backend. Most feature-complete JavaScript file uploader.

gotchas: Bundle size adds up with multiple plugins
Dashboard UI styling requires CSS customization
Transloadit adds cost for cloud processing
best_when: Apps needing file upload from multiple sources (Drive, Dropbox, webcam)
Large file uploads needing resumable TUS protocol
Image upload with client-side crop/compress before upload
avoid_when: Simple single-file upload (native HTML input simpler)
Minimal upload UI without the full Dashboard widget
summary: Uppy is the most feature-complete JavaScript file uploader. Dashboard UI with drag-drop, webcam, screen capture. Sources: local files, Google Drive, Dropbox, Unsplash. TUS resumable uploads, S3 multipart, image cropping/compression plugins. React/Vue/Angular integrations. Best for apps needing file upload from multiple sources with rich UI. Simple uploads don't need Uppy's complexity.
